data.title: Trump Restaurant In The Metaverse? President's Trademark Shows Fans Could Wear Virtual MAGA Hats There Soon
data.description: The Trump Organization, which is privately owned by President Donald Trump, recently filed a new trademark for several cryptocurrency and NFT-related items. Here's a look at what the move means and how Trump could be betting on the future growth of the metaverse.

data.title: Bitcoin's 24% Correction 'Mostly Technical' Say Experts
data.description: A sharp decline in cryptocurrency sentiment, dubbed a “mega nuke” by analysts, has gripped the market as Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) fell below $79,000 on Thursday evening, down 24% from its January peak of $109,590.

data.title: Here's How Much $1000 Invested In Jones Lang LaSalle 20 Years Ago Would Be Worth Today
What's Going On With SoundHound AI Shares Friday?
data.description: SoundHound AI shares are moving higher on Friday after the company reported better-than-expected fourth-quarter earnings and raised its fiscal-year 2025 guidance on Thursday after the market closed.

data.title: Duolingo's AI Investments Set The Stage For Long-Term Growth—Analyst Sees Stock Hitting $400
data.description: Analyst raises Duolingo's price forecast to $400 while maintaining Buy rating. Company reports mixed Q4 results with strong DAU growth and increased investments for long-term growth.
